name: super-attractor
description: Gabrielle Bernstein's 'Super Attractor: Methods for Manifesting a Life beyond Your Wildest Dreams' — a practical guide to manifesting through spiritual alignment. Covers how to connect to the Universe, release fear-based beliefs, take spiritually aligned action, appreciate more, and co-create the life you want by tuning into good-feeling emotions.
useCase: Learning to manifest desires, strengthening spiritual connection, releasing fear, taking aligned action, and living with faith in the Universe.
knownRisks: Manifesting concepts may not resonate with skeptical readers
Written from a specific spiritual perspective (influenced by A Course in Miracles and Abraham-Hicks)
Some may find the tone overly optimistic
